text:
This is to inform all faculty, staff, and students of the Netaji Subhas
University of Technology that the Centre of Extension and Field
Outreach (EFO) is organizing the “Ambedkar Jayanti Youth Summit
2026” on the occasion of Ambedkar Jayanti.

Date: 11th April 2026
Details of the event:
Date: 13th April 2026.
Time: 10:00 AM onwards
Venue: APJ 11, Main Campus, NSUT.
We are pleased to announce that Ms. Ankita Anand, IAS, Special
Secretary (WCD), Delhi, will grace the summit as the Chief Guest.
Other distinguished university dignitaries will also be present.
Dr.Akhilesh Dubey
Officer In-Charge
Extension And Field Outreach(EFO)

Centre of Extension and Field Outreach (EFO)
The prestigious event, to pay tribute to the father of the Indian
Constitution, Dr. B.R. Ambedkar, and embodying the core values
of Justice • Liberty • Equality • Fraternity‬)
